notes: Wilmington Earned Income Tax — 1.25% on residents and on anyone working in Wilmington.
Kansas City earnings tax — 1% on residents and on non-residents working in KC.
St. Louis earnings tax — 1% on residents and on non-residents working in STL.
NYC personal income tax (residents only); top bracket 3.876%. Administered by NYS DOR (NYS-50-T-NYC).
Yonkers resident income tax surcharge ~16.75% of NY state tax (effective ~1.62%); non-resident earnings tax 0.5%. (NYS-50-T-Y).
